How it works

Simple from day one

One conversation, one visual, one decision — then the green simply arrives and stays beautiful.

01

Tell us about your space

Upload a few photos or book a quick visit. We look at light, layout and the feel you're after — from a single statement reception to a full floor.

02

See it transformed in 24 hours

We design a tailored visual of your actual space, styled with our plants, and send it via email or WhatsApp. Free, no obligation.

03

We install, style and maintain

Once you're happy, we deliver and style everything. Then we visit weekly — watering, feeding, rotating and replacing — so your space always looks its best.

Pricing

One flat monthly fee. Everything included.

From R2,900 / month

Fully managed packages sized to your space — from a styled reception to a full floor of greenery. We'll recommend the right fit after seeing your space.

Get a tailored proposal
  • Customised installation, styled to your space
  • Weekly maintenance visits — watering, feeding, care
  • Replacements at no extra cost if a plant struggles

  • Personal advisory — the owner is involved in every install

Our story

Rooted in Johannesburg. Grown in Pretoria.

"We don't just drop off plants. We become part of your space."

What started as a family passion for plants became something we couldn't keep to ourselves. We launched Drift and Bloom in 2025 to bring living, breathing spaces to the businesses around us — with care, style and a personal touch you won't find anywhere else.

FAQ

Questions, answered

What does it cost?

Fully managed packages start from R2,900 per month, sized to your space and plant count. That single fee covers everything — installation, plants, pots, weekly maintenance and replacements. After seeing your space (or a photo of it), we'll recommend the right package and send a tailored proposal.

What exactly is included?

Customised installation, curated plants and pots, weekly maintenance visits, replacements at no extra cost if a plant struggles, and seasonal rotation so your space stays fresh. You never water, feed or worry about a plant — that's our job.

Am I locked into a long contract?

Our standard agreement runs 12 months, but you can exit penalty-free after four months. We'd rather earn your business every month than hold you to a page of fine print.

Which areas do you cover?

We serve businesses across Johannesburg — including Sandton, Rosebank, Illovo, Bryanston, Hyde Park, Melrose and surrounds — as well as Pretoria. If you're nearby but not sure, just ask.

What happens if a plant dies or starts struggling?

We replace it at no extra cost. Our weekly visits mean we usually spot a struggling plant before you do, and we rotate stock so your space always looks its best.

How does the free 24-hour visualisation work?

Send us a clear photo of your reception, boardroom or workspace. Our team digitally places our plants into your actual space and sends the designed visual back within 24 hours, via email or WhatsApp. It's free, with no obligation — a clear picture of what's possible before any commitment.

We already have plants — can you take them over?

Often, yes. We'll do a free workspace assessment, look at what you have, and recommend whether a refresh, rotation or full takeover makes the most sense for your space and budget.

Do you do once-off rentals for events or weddings?

Yes — we provide short-term plant styling for corporate events, functions and weddings, including delivery, arrangement and collection. Get in touch with your date and venue and we'll take it from there.
